title: The Hidden Lives of Ants!

scenes.text: Ants communicate and organize in ways that rival human societies!
They use pheromones to signal danger and lead others to food.
Some ants will even sacrifice themselves for the colony's safety!
Many species exhibit agriculture, farming fungi and raising aphids!
scenes.label: ANT AGRICULTURE

scenes.text: Follow if you love learning something new.

description: Ants lead complex lives, communicating and organizing just like humans. Discover their secrets! Follow for daily facts!
